title: Quest Electric Coffee & Spice Grinder, Stainless Steel Blades, Coffee Beans, Nuts, Seeds, Spices & Herbs, 150W, 50g Capacity, 34160
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by Koksi Corp..
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: COMPACT COFFEE GRINDER – This compact coffee grinder packs a powerful punch, and utilises a 150W motor that rotates the stainless steel blades to perfectly grind down your coffee beans into the perfect consistency, ready to make the best home brew possible.

ONE TOUCH OPERATION – The coffee grinder has a 50g capacity, is easy to use, and features a one touch button operation to begin the grind process as soon as the lid is secured. For added peace of mind the unit also features an auto shut-off functionality if the lid is displaced during use.

CLEAR VIEWING WINDOW – The electric coffee grinder features a clear lid that allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times, ensuring the beans are ground exactly how you require them. The coffee grinder is stainless steel in its construction, making it hardwearing and durable.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL – As well as grinding coffee beans this personal grinder is also perfect for grinding down nuts, seeds, spices, herbs, and many other items! This makes it a versatile kitchen appliance, and one that will be of great use to both coffee lovers and seasoned home chefs.

QUEST– Quest is the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, toasters, & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Also Grinds Spices, Beans, Nuts & More Compact Electric Coffee Grinder This compact grinder is a dynamic kitchen appliance perfect for grinding down coffee beans for a morning brew. It has a 50g capacity, utilises 150W of power, and features easy one-touch operation. The stainless steel blades inside ensure precise, consistent grinding for coffee beans, nuts, spices, and more. Previous page Dual Flat Blades The two stainless steel blades ensures that coffee beans & more are ground to a perfect consistency. One Touch Operation Once the lid is secured shut, simply press the button on the front to begin grinding. Stainless Steel Surface The exterior is made of durable brushed stainless steel, making cleaning as simple as wiping it down Multi-Purpose Grinding This machine isn't just useful for coffee beans, but also for nuts, spices, herbs, seeds, and more. Clear Viewing Lid Keep an eye on the progress at all times thanks to the safe clear viewing window built into the lid.
